items.title: S01E01 - Pilot
items.summary: Shasta McNasty is a rap/rock band made up of the three slackers Scott, Dennis and Randy. While the guys should spend their days practicing their music, they can usually be found hanging out on Venice Beach, drinking in Captain Verne's Bar or coming up with wacky ideas to make life a little more interesting.

infolabels.title: Pilot
infolabels.plot: Shasta McNasty is a rap/rock band made up of the three slackers Scott, Dennis and Randy. While the guys should spend their days practicing their music, they can usually be found hanging out on Venice Beach, drinking in Captain Verne's Bar or coming up with wacky ideas to make life a little more interesting.

items.title: S01E02 - Little Dude
items.summary: Scotty is involved in a brawl with Verne, an angry little person, and his girlfriend is not too happy about it.

infolabels.title: Little Dude
infolabels.plot: Scotty is involved in a brawl with Verne, an angry little person, and his girlfriend is not too happy about it.

items.title: S01E03 - Adult Education
items.summary: Dennis is a guest on 'Win Ben Stein's Money'.

infolabels.title: Adult Education
infolabels.plot: Dennis is a guest on 'Win Ben Stein's Money'.

items.title: S01E04 - Chubby Chick
items.summary: Dennis thinks that his chubby girlfriend will dump him when she loses weight.

infolabels.title: Chubby Chick
infolabels.plot: Dennis thinks that his chubby girlfriend will dump him when she loses weight.

items.title: S01E05 - The Return of Buster
items.summary: Scott convinces Dennis and Randy to spend Halloween watching scary movies with him, but he soon becomes scared as he has a nightmare involving Buster the talking parrot.

infolabels.title: The Return of Buster
infolabels.plot: Scott convinces Dennis and Randy to spend Halloween watching scary movies with him, but he soon becomes scared as he has a nightmare involving Buster the talking parrot.

items.title: S01E06 - Angels in Lingerie are Devils in Disguise
items.summary: Scott attempts to tranform Tina, a clumsy waitress, into a sexy lingerie model. She has trouble finding a job when they realise that she looks exactly the same as Victoria's Secret model Suzanne Lanza. Dennis tries to help out, and lands himself a job in the process.

infolabels.title: Angels in Lingerie are Devils in Disguise
infolabels.plot: Scott attempts to tranform Tina, a clumsy waitress, into a sexy lingerie model. She has trouble finding a job when they realise that she looks exactly the same as Victoria's Secret model Suzanne Lanza. Dennis tries to help out, and lands himself a job in the process.

items.title: S01E07 - Viva Las Vegas
items.summary: Dennis convinces Randy and Scott to come on his road trip to Las Vegas following the sequence of his free coupon book. The trip turns into a disaster when Scott's former high school girlfriend sticks her new boyfriend, a hitman, onto the boys.

infolabels.title: Viva Las Vegas
infolabels.plot: Dennis convinces Randy and Scott to come on his road trip to Las Vegas following the sequence of his free coupon book. The trip turns into a disaster when Scott's former high school girlfriend sticks her new boyfriend, a hitman, onto the boys.

items.title: S01E08 - The Thanksgiving Show
items.summary: When the boys take a trip to the homeless shelter on Thanksgiving, Dennis is reunited with his deadbeat father, Jack. Jack moves in with the boys, but soon they are all sick of him, and try to get him and his stripper girlfriend back together, so he will move back out.

infolabels.title: The Thanksgiving Show
infolabels.plot: When the boys take a trip to the homeless shelter on Thanksgiving, Dennis is reunited with his deadbeat father, Jack. Jack moves in with the boys, but soon they are all sick of him, and try to get him and his stripper girlfriend back together, so he will move back out.

items.title: S01E09 - The Menace from Venice
items.summary: The boys decide to turn Verne into a professional boxer after he gets into a fight with another little person in a club.

infolabels.title: The Menace from Venice
infolabels.plot: The boys decide to turn Verne into a professional boxer after he gets into a fight with another little person in a club.

items.title: S01E10 - Bed Worthy
items.summary: As Dennis babysits the landlord's grandchildren, he entertains them with a story involving the boys, Diana and a bed.

infolabels.title: Bed Worthy
infolabels.plot: As Dennis babysits the landlord's grandchildren, he entertains them with a story involving the boys, Diana and a bed.

items.title: S01E11 - Big Brother
items.summary: When the boys return from Tijuana, they learn that Eduardo, a bull fighter, has stowed away in their trunk in order to find his long-lost fiance. Meanwhile, Dennis joins a big brother programme, but his little brother soon begins copying his every move.

infolabels.title: Big Brother
infolabels.plot: When the boys return from Tijuana, they learn that Eduardo, a bull fighter, has stowed away in their trunk in order to find his long-lost fiance. Meanwhile, Dennis joins a big brother programme, but his little brother soon begins copying his every move.

items.title: S01E12 - Leo is a Pain in My...
items.summary: Dennis sells people looks at the rash on his behind in order to collect money to pay the rent.

infolabels.title: Leo is a Pain in My...
infolabels.plot: Dennis sells people looks at the rash on his behind in order to collect money to pay the rent.

items.title: S01E13 - The Crush
items.summary: The band brainstorms new ideas for names, when they dicover they can not use the 'McNasty' in Shasta McNasty. Meanwhile Diana tries to sabotage Scott's latest realtionship after she reveals she has romantic feelings for him.

infolabels.title: The Crush
infolabels.plot: The band brainstorms new ideas for names, when they dicover they can not use the 'McNasty' in Shasta McNasty. Meanwhile Diana tries to sabotage Scott's latest realtionship after she reveals she has romantic feelings for him.

items.title: S01E14 - The F Word
items.summary: Diana accidently draws Scott's ex-girlfriend to him, when she attempts to find out more about his past. Meanwhile, Dennis encounters 'perfume withdrawal', as he searches to find his girlfriend the perfect gift for Valentine's Day.

infolabels.title: The F Word
infolabels.plot: Diana accidently draws Scott's ex-girlfriend to him, when she attempts to find out more about his past. Meanwhile, Dennis encounters 'perfume withdrawal', as he searches to find his girlfriend the perfect gift for Valentine's Day.

items.title: S01E15 - True Size
items.summary: Verne enlists the help of Michelle and Diana when a scam leaves his bank account empty.

infolabels.title: True Size
infolabels.plot: Verne enlists the help of Michelle and Diana when a scam leaves his bank account empty.

items.title: S01E16 - The Shortest Yard
items.summary: Verne bets his arch rival that his less than great Pee-Wee League football team will win a game. Meanwhile, Scott and Randy bribe a cheerleading team to appear, by telling them that a LA Laker cheerleading scout will be in the crowd.

infolabels.title: The Shortest Yard
infolabels.plot: Verne bets his arch rival that his less than great Pee-Wee League football team will win a game. Meanwhile, Scott and Randy bribe a cheerleading team to appear, by telling them that a LA Laker cheerleading scout will be in the crowd.

items.title: S01E17 - Bachelorette Party
items.summary: When Diana's boss makes her throw a bachelorette for his fiance, she is convinced by the boys to have it at Captain Verne's Bar, with the boys doing the catering. The boys, however, have other plans as Verne installs a secret two-way mirror and begins charging people to watch the party. The bride-to-be convinces Dennis to bring out the kinky lingerie and the stripper, making it a night none of them will soon forget.

infolabels.title: Bachelorette Party
infolabels.plot: When Diana's boss makes her throw a bachelorette for his fiance, she is convinced by the boys to have it at Captain Verne's Bar, with the boys doing the catering. The boys, however, have other plans as Verne installs a secret two-way mirror and begins charging people to watch the party. The bride-to-be convinces Dennis to bring out the kinky lingerie and the stripper, making it a night none of them will soon forget.

items.title: S01E18 - The Sugar Pill
items.summary: Shasta's performance for a record executive at Captain Verne's Bar is interupted by Scott having to entertain Verne's date's sister, Michelle's unexpected return and Dennis taking experimental psychotropic pills for money.

infolabels.title: The Sugar Pill
infolabels.plot: Shasta's performance for a record executive at Captain Verne's Bar is interupted by Scott having to entertain Verne's date's sister, Michelle's unexpected return and Dennis taking experimental psychotropic pills for money.

items.title: S01E19 - The Quiz
items.summary: Dennis decides to go on the show ""Win Ben Stein's Money"" and gets a butt-kicking from Ben himself.

infolabels.title: The Quiz
infolabels.plot: Dennis decides to go on the show ""Win Ben Stein's Money"" and gets a butt-kicking from Ben himself.

items.title: S01E20 - Blue Flu
items.summary: All of the guys each come down with a bad case of the flu, and learn about some of the simpler things in life.

infolabels.title: Blue Flu
infolabels.plot: All of the guys each come down with a bad case of the flu, and learn about some of the simpler things in life.

items.title: S01E21 - Play Dead, Clown
items.summary: The guys meet Twinkles the clown, and we then see which third of Shasta is frightened of them.

infolabels.title: Play Dead, Clown
infolabels.plot: The guys meet Twinkles the clown, and we then see which third of Shasta is frightened of them.

items.title: S01E22 - Behind the Band: 2010
items.summary: The guys get an insight into what their futures will be like, if they continue on the road they are heading. This makes them wonder if they even want to be in a band anymore.

infolabels.title: Behind the Band: 2010
